evidence_quotes.quote: video games being discontinued or rendered unplayable by developers.

paragraphs.text: Hello, as a member of the gaming community, I would like to express my concern regarding the increasing number of video games being discontinued or rendered unplayable by developers. This trend appears to affect not only online multiplayer titles but also single-player games, which are increasingly released with mandatory online requirements. In many cases, these games could remain accessible if users were allowed to host their own servers or play offline. However, the current approach often leads to titles becoming unavailable, even when there are technically feasible solutions to preserve them. This practice may be driven by commercial considerations, encouraging consumers to purchase newer products, but it comes at the cost of long-term access and preservation. I believe video games should be recognized and protected as a legitimate form of artistic and cultural expression. Accordingly, there should be safeguards to prevent games from being removed or made unplayable solely at the discretion of publishers.
